intake.requestDetail: Build a simple admin dashboard and provide a deployable demo.
intake.existingMaterials: Reference screenshots, old source zip, database export.
missingInformation: whether source code must be delivered
intake.nextAction: Ask for source zip, database file, and target demo screenshots.
intake.confirmationMessage: I will check the source files, database, and expected demo effect first, then confirm the quote and timeline so the scope stays clear.

project.acceptanceCriteria: The demo can run locally and the agreed admin pages are visible.
